info.description: JSON API consumed by the React admin UI and available to external integrators. The device-facing sync API (under /sync, /document-storage, etc.) is intentionally NOT documented here — those paths are a firmware contract.
info.title: rmfakecloud Admin API

parameters.description: Document file(s) to upload — repeat the field for multiple
parameters.name: file

parameters.description: Parent folder UUID (omit or 'root' for root)
parameters.name: parent

409.description: document with same name already exists (response includes docId)

403.description: Localfs provider — edit user profile manually
Localfs provider — edit user profile manually

get.summary: Download a file from a configured integration
Browse a folder on a configured integration

parameters.description: Folder path (use leading slash; empty for root)
parameters.name: path

get.summary: Get metadata for a file on a configured integration

400.description: wrong user, missing fields, or wrong current password

get.summary: Request a WebRTC offer from the active screenshare session
Get the caller's active screenshare room
Get a screenshare room by ID

delete.summary: Tear down all screenshare rooms for the caller

parameters.description: Room ID (currently ignored — all caller rooms are deleted)
parameters.name: roomId

post.summary: Send a WebRTC answer to a screenshare room

get.summary: Trigger sync notification for connected devices

parameters.description: User to update — ID must reference an existing user
parameters.name: user

get.summary: Get a user by ID (admin or self)

401.description: querying a different user as non-admin

500.description: cannot delete current user, or storage error

thumbnail.description: Thumbnail is base64 encoded string of an image/png

path.description:
Localfs
really dangerous as it allows path traversal

additionalScopes.description: AdditionalScopes is a list of scopes to add to the user session.

integrations.description: Integrations stores the list of "Integrations" as shown on the tablet.

isAdmin.description: IsAdmin indicates if the user can managed others users in this instance.

sync15.description: Sync15 if the user should use this sync type (which uses a lot less bandwidth).
